summary: Matrix recording of a July 4th show with solid performances of Bertha, Rain and Snow and Watchtower despite limited technical commentary.
review: The UltraMatrix source captures this Fourth‑of‑July gig from Buffalo, but reviewers give no concrete details on sound clarity. Musically the set opened strong with a “great” Bertha, carried through Rain & Snow and closed with a solid Watchtower, though the overall vibe is described as “middle of the road.”

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; positive remarks about a few songs but no recording quality details and a zero‑star rating suggest limited enthusiasm.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on clarity or mix; reviewers focus on anecdotal story rather than audio fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Starts strong, settles into a middle‑of‑the‑road groove before finishing solidly; overall pacing described as uneven.
